---
name: Crash Report
description: Report a crash or startup failure
title: "[CRASH] "
labels: ["bug", "crash", "needs-triage"]
---

## Crash Description

Describe what happened before the crash.

## When Did It Happen?

- Startup
- Installing a mod
- Launching the game
- Other

## Error Output

Paste any error message shown.

## Logs

Attach the log file.

Typical locations:

Windows: %APPDATA%/needlelight/logs
Linux: ~/.config/needlelight/logs
macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/needlelight/logs

## System Information

- Needlelight Version:
- Operating System:
- Architecture: (x64 / ARM64)
- Game Version:

## Additional Context

Add any other information that might help.
